global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a logo, game icons, and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to unlock rewards in the game NeonArena.

elements.label: NeonArena logo

elements.label: Game icons

elements.description: A prominent headline text that reads 'Unlock rare gear' in a large, bold font.
